recommendations.title: Tremors: Shrieker Island
recommendations.overview: When a group of hunters genetically modify Graboid eggs, they face an all-out war against the larger, terrifyingly intelligent creatures, and swiftly multiplying Shriekers!

recommendations.title: Sniper: Ghost Shooter
recommendations.overview: Elite snipers Brandon Beckett and Richard Miller are fighting extremists in the Middle East when the Colonel gives them a new mission: to protect a gas pipeline stretching from the Republic of Georgia to Western Europe from extremists eager to make a

recommendations.title: Tremors: A Cold Day in Hell
recommendations.overview: Burt Gummer and Travis Welker find themselves in a fight for survival after investigating deadly giant worm attacks in the Canadian arctic.

recommendations.title: Death Race: Beyond Anarchy
recommendations.overview: Black Ops specialist Connor Gibson infiltrates a maximum security prison to take down legendary driver Frankenstein in a violent and brutal car race.

recommendations.title: Scorpion King: Book of Souls
recommendations.overview: The Scorpion King teams up with a female warrior named Tala, who is the sister of The Nubian King. Together they search for a legendary relic known as The Book of Souls, which will allow them to put an end to an evil warlord.

recommendations.title: Half Past Dead
recommendations.overview: A man goes undercover in a hi-tech prison to find out information to help prosecute those who killed his wife. While there, he stumbles onto a plot involving a death-row inmate and his $200 million stash of gold.

recommendations.title: Tremors 5: Bloodlines
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When Gummer is hired to capture a deadly creature terrorizing South Africa, he and his new sidekick, Travis Welker, engage in another battle of survival against the fiercely aggressive Graboids.

recommendations.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
recommendations.overview: Major Ronan Jackson, an accomplished fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces and son of a U.S. Senator, is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace. After miraculously surviving the crash, Jackson is taken captive by a group of Hezbollah mi

recommendations.title: Kindergarten Cop 2
recommendations.overview: Assigned to recover sensitive stolen data, a gruff FBI agent goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher, but the school's liberal, politically correct environment is more than he bargained for.

recommendations.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
